album.title: Stockdale Christian School Band Compilation
album.subtitle: Under the direction of Gary Scudder
album.story:
## Why this album

We lost touch for years — then one group chat turned into **this**: a set of recordings from alumni who never stopped hearing the downbeat.

- A thank-you to directors who believed in late rehearsals
- A nod to friends in the back row

> “Same stands. Different hairlines.” — *section leader, woodwinds*

[Placeholder link](https://example.com) for your band or program site.
